languages.text: {n}Широкие скулы, темные брови и полный внутренней силы взгляд. Вы также замечаете тонко выведенные упрямые складки на лбу и в уголках рта. Художник изо всех сил старался передать непростой характер волевого человека и, кажется, отлично с этим справился.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Рельефный профиль, темные брови, блестящие волосы и полный внутренней силы взгляд. Любому потомку было бы приятно найти в себе общие черты с этим благородным визажем.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Chiselled features, dark brows, and a gaze full of inner strength. You also notice the finely worked furrows of stubbornness on his forehead and at the corners of his mouth. The artist strove to capture the complex character of a strong-willed man, and seems to have done a superlative job.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Широкие скулы, темные брови и полный внутренней силы взгляд. Вы также замечаете тонко выведенные упрямые складки на лбу и в уголках рта. Художник изо всех сил старался передать непростой характер волевого человека и, кажется, отлично с этим справился.{/n}

languages.text: {n}彫りの深い顔立ち、濃い眉、そして内なる力に満ちた眼差し。さらにあなたは、額や口角に刻まれた、頑なさを物語る細やかな皺にも気づく。画家は強い意志を持つ男の複雑な人物像を捉えようと腐心し、その出来映えは見事というほかない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Chiselled features, dark brows, and a gaze full of inner strength. You also notice the finely worked furrows of stubbornness on his forehead and at the corners of his mouth. The artist strove to capture the complex character of a strong-willed man, and seems to have done a superlative job.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}彫りの深い顔立ち、濃い眉、そして内なる力に満ちた眼差し。さらにあなたは、額や口角に刻まれた、頑なさを物語る細やかな皺にも気づく。画家は強い意志を持つ男の複雑な人物像を捉えようと腐心し、その出来映えは見事というほかない。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Des traits burinés, des sourcils sombres et un regard empreint de force intérieure. Vous remarquez également les fines rides d'entêtement sur son front et à la commissure de ses lèvres. L'artiste s'est donné le plus grand mal pour immortaliser le caractère complexe d'un homme déterminé et semble avoir réussi avec brio.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Chiselled features, dark brows, and a gaze full of inner strength. You also notice the finely worked furrows of stubbornness on his forehead and at the corners of his mouth. The artist strove to capture the complex character of a strong-willed man, and seems to have done a superlative job.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Des traits burinés, des sourcils sombres et un regard empreint de force intérieure. L'artiste s'est donné le plus grand mal pour immortaliser le caractère complexe d'un homme déterminé et semble avoir réussi avec brio.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yontulmuş hatlarla, koyu kaşlarla ve içsel güçle dolu bir bakış. Ayrıca alnındaki ve ağzının köşelerindeki ince işlenmiş inatçılık kırışıklıklarını da fark ediyorsun. Sanatçı, iradeli bir adamın karmaşık karakterini yakalamaya çalışmış ve oldukça iyi bir iş çıkarmış gibi görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Chiselled features, dark brows, and a gaze full of inner strength. You also notice the finely worked furrows of stubbornness on his forehead and at the corners of his mouth. The artist strove to capture the complex character of a strong-willed man, and seems to have done a superlative job.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yontulmuş hatlarla, koyu kaşlarla ve içsel güçle dolu bir bakış. Ayrıca alnındaki ve ağzının köşelerindeki ince işlenmiş inatçılık kırışıklıklarını da fark ediyorsun. Sanatçı, iradeli bir adamın karmaşık karakterini yakalamaya çalışmış ve oldukça iyi bir iş çıkarmış gibi görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Markante Züge, dunkle Brauen und ein Blick, der von innerer Stärke zeugt. Dir fallen auch die sorgfältig herausgearbeiteten Furchen auf seiner Stirn und die Sorgenfalten an seinem Mund auf. Der Künstler hat versucht, den komplexen Charakter eines willensstarken Mannes zum Ausdruck zu bringen und scheint dabei überragende Arbeit geleistet zu haben.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Chiselled features, dark brows, and a gaze full of inner strength. You also notice the finely worked furrows of stubbornness on his forehead and at the corners of his mouth. The artist strove to capture the complex character of a strong-willed man, and seems to have done a superlative job.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Markante Züge, dunkle Brauen und ein Blick, der von innerer Stärke zeugt. Dir fallen auch die sorgfältig herausgearbeiteten Furchen auf seiner Stirn und die Sorgenfalten an seinem Mund auf. Der Künstler hat versucht, den komplexen Charakter eines willensstarken Mannes zum Ausdruck zu bringen und scheint dabei überragende Arbeit geleistet zu haben.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Facciones cinceladas, cejas oscuras y una mirada cargada de fuerza interior. También reparas en las delicadas arrugas de tozudez en su frente y en las comisuras de sus labios. El artista se esforzó por capturar el complejo carácter de un hombre pertinaz, y parece haber hecho un trabajo excelente.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Chiselled features, dark brows, and a gaze full of inner strength. You also notice the finely worked furrows of stubbornness on his forehead and at the corners of his mouth. The artist strove to capture the complex character of a strong-willed man, and seems to have done a superlative job.{/n}

El artista se esforzó por capturar el complejo carácter de un hombre pertinaz, y parece haber hecho un trabajo excelente.{/n}

languages.text: {n}轮廓分明的面容、浓黑的眉毛，以及充满内在力量的目光。你还注意到他额头和嘴角处精细刻画的、彰显固执的细纹。画家力图捕捉这位意志坚强之人的复杂性格，而且似乎完成得极为出色。{/n}
